name: Vite + Vercel client routing
description: Drop-in vercel.json that rewrites every unmatched path to /index.html so client-side routes survive a refresh on Vercel.
notes: Use this on any client-side-routed app (React Router, TanStack Router) deployed to Vercel. Without this rewrite, deep links return 404 after a refresh. Equivalent for Netlify is a _redirects file with `/* /index.html 200`.
